text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 59 

MDCD_TOTAL_SPEND 

LABEL: Medicaid Payment Amount — Total 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of Medicaid payment amount from the inpatient (IP), long-term care (LT), 
pharmacy (RX) and other services (OT) (header) claims for the beneficiary during the year. Note that 
this dollar amount may be an undercount if the beneficiary had managed care claims. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Claims files (derived)
